title: A Plan The Muses Entertained.
content:
A plan the Muses entertain'd

    Methodically to impart

    To Psyche the poetic art;
    Prosaic-pure her soul remain'd.
    No wondrous sounds escaped her lyre

    E'en in the fairest Summer night;
    But Amor came with glance of fire, 

    The lesson soon was learn'd aright.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe delivers a powerful performance in "A Plan The Muses Entertained."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
